title: Ubiquiti RocketDish 30dBi, 5GHz, Rocket Kit, Light Weight - Kit 2pcs
description: Parabolic dual antenna Ubiquiti RocketDish RD-5G30-LW 5 GHz, gain 30 dBi, diameter 650 mm, without radome, dual 2x2 MIMO. The antenna has a greater depth of the dish and therefore greater resistance to interference than the original model RD-5G30. The antenna comes with a tilting mast mount, Rocket unit mount, cable cover, unit cover and a pair of pigtails for connecting the unit Thanks to the built-in mounting system of the so-called rocket kit, any Rocket unit can be directly mounted on this antenna without the need for additional accessories. Simply click the Rocket and you're done
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,6 F/B ratio [dB] 30 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 6 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 6 Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 30 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
